commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=08d2d9a726273583d5d548cedb49e1e592cb5afa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the bridge client to choose an action-specific default timeout, adds a 150s default for message, multipart, attachment, and poll sends, and adds protocol tests for the new timeout helper.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection does show current main gives all bridge invokes the same 10s default, and the PR body reports macOS private sends can exceed that window.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs contributor revision and real macOS bridge proof rather than an automated repair because the remaining merge gate is partly live-environment evidence.

target.title: fix: use longer bridge timeout for send actions
target.body:
## Summary
- use a 150s default bridge response timeout for send-style actions
- keep the existing 10s default for non-send bridge actions
- preserve explicit per-call timeout overrides such as short status probes

This backs the OpenClaw iMessage send timeout in openclaw/openclaw#91041 at the actual imsg bridge layer.

## Verification
- `swift format lint Sources/IMsgCore/IMsgBridgeClient.swift Sources/IMsgCore/IMsgBridgeProtocol.swift Tests/IMsgCoreTests/IMsgBridgeProtocolTests.swift`
- `DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer swift test --filter IMsgBridgeProtocolTests`
- `DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer swift test --filter RPCBridgeMessageHandlersTests --filter RPCServerBridgeTests --filter BridgeRichCommandTests`
- `DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer make test` (325 tests in 2 suites passed)
target.author: omarshahine
